content.about: Oakland Antique Appraisals provides professional antique appraisal services in the Oakland area with expertise in antique furniture, collectibles, fine art, and estate items. We offer thorough, accurate valuations for insurance, estate planning, charitable donations, and more.
content.notes: Oakland Antique Appraisals serves Oakland, CA with antique appraisal support focused on Antique Furniture, Vintage Collectibles.

reviews.author: Jennifer M.
reviews.content: I needed an appraisal for a charitable donation of my antique collection, and they delivered excellent service. All tax requirements were met perfectly.

content.about: Talisman Antiques is a well-established antique shop in Oakland's Rockridge neighborhood offering a curated selection of antique furniture, decorative arts, and vintage collectibles. They provide professional antique appraisals and restoration consultation services to the Oakland community.
content.notes: Located in the Rockridge neighborhood of Oakland. 18 reviews with strong ratings.

content.about: Rick Levine Antiques is an Oakland-based antique dealer and appraiser specializing in antique furniture, decorative arts, and fine art. They provide professional antique appraisal services and estate valuations throughout the San Francisco Bay Area.
content.notes: Located in Oakland, CA serving the Bay Area.

content.about: Mission Group Appraisal provides professional estate and antique appraisal services in Oakland, CA. They specialize in estate appraisal, antiques, and personal property valuations with certified appraisers serving the Bay Area.
content.notes: Serves Oakland and the broader San Francisco Bay Area.

content.about: Talisman Antiques is a well-regarded antique shop on College Avenue in Oakland, CA offering a curated selection of antiques, vintage collectibles, furniture, and decorative arts. They provide professional antique appraisal services alongside their retail operations, serving collectors and estate clients throughout the Oakland and East Bay area.
content.notes: Located at 6007 College Ave, Oakland, CA. Top-rated on Yelp for Antique Appraisal in Oakland.

content.about: ValuePros Appraisal Services is a family-owned appraisal firm operating since 1976. They serve the Oakland, CA area with USPAP-compliant appraisal reports for antiques, collectibles, fine art, and personal property. As independent accredited appraisers, they provide unbiased valuations for insurance, estate planning, charitable donations, and legal matters.
content.notes: Family owned since 1976. Independent appraisers serving Oakland CA and the Bay Area.

content.about: Sorted Estates provides professional antique appraisals and estate sale services in the Oakland, CA area. They handle everything from single-item antique valuations to full estate liquidations, serving families and individuals throughout the East Bay area with comprehensive estate consulting.
content.notes: Serves Oakland CA and the East Bay. Full-service estate and appraisal firm.

content.about: Berkeley Personal Property Appraisers provides IRS-qualified antique and personal property appraisals serving Oakland and the broader East Bay area. They specialize in valuations for estate tax, insurance, charitable donation, and personal property needs with thorough, USPAP-compliant reports.
content.notes: IRS-qualified, USPAP-compliant. Serves Oakland CA and the East Bay from Berkeley.
